name: Eating and drinking
description:
It is good to keep your good healthy. To eat, just type 'eat food'. You
have a bread in your inventary, so, type 'eat bread' to eat it. To
drink, just type 'drink containner'. You have a bottle, so, type drink
bottle.
Do not worry, you neve die of lack of food or drinking in this mud, but it
is good to keep good healty to improve the stamina of your player.
Type 'n' to continue.
